target.title: docs: include plugin prerelease in release validation approval
target.body:
## Summary
- Update the Full Release Validation section in `docs/reference/RELEASING.md` to mention the separate `Plugin Prerelease` child workflow.
- Require `plugin_prerelease` success in full/all approval criteria unless the rerun group intentionally skipped that child.
- Leave the existing conditional `npm_telegram` guidance intact.

## Source
- ClawSweeper commit finding for openclaw/openclaw@a0fd105e5e41fafd7f537843af0dea9bd1a7336f.
- Verified still present on main at 4c98a547d09afbfbd8da94e2275b8f72fdc7d3eb.

## Validation
- `pnpm check:changed`

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: clawsweeper-commit-openclaw-openclaw-a0fd105e5e41
- Source PRs: none
- Credit: Source finding is the ClawSweeper commit report for openclaw/openclaw@a0fd105e5e41fafd7f537843af0dea9bd1a7336f.; No source PR is being replaced, so no contributor PR attribution is required.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed
